page_metadata.biotools__summary: Sliding Window Analysis of Ka and Ks (SWAKK) is tool for detecting positive selection in proteins using a sliding window substitution rate analysis. The program can display the results on a 3D protein structure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Sliding Window Analysis of Ka and Ks (SWAKK) is tool for detecting positive selection in proteins using a sliding window substitution rate analysis. The program can display the results on a 3D protein structure.
